Pero llamar la atención trae problemas.","palette":"green money-focused tones"},{"number":4,"title":"PROBLEMAS Y ENEMIGOS","scene":"two dangerous men facing forward with a yellow warning triangle between them","text":"Otros traficantes peligrosos, la policía y un hombre muy inteligente llamado Gus se cruzan en su camino.","palette":"muted blue and brown tones with warning yellow accent"},{"number":5,"title":"WALTER CAMBIA","scene":"Walter transformed into Heisenberg, bald with black shirt, in front of green smoke, with black hat and sunglasses floating symbolically behind him","text":"Con el tiempo, Walter deja de ser el buen profesor y se convierte en \"Heisenberg\", un hombre frío y sin miedo.","palette":"green smoky background and black clothing for menace"},{"number":6,"title":"EL FINAL","scene":"sunset desert with Walter on the left and Jesse on the right, separated and facing away emotionally","text":"Walter intenta arreglar sus errores y proteger a su familia, pero las consecuencias de sus decisiones son muy grandes.","palette":"warm orange sunset tones"}],"bottom":{"summary_box":{"title":"EN RESUMEN...","text":"Breaking Bad es la historia de un hombre que hizo algo malo para ayudar a su familia, pero terminó perdiéndose en el camino.","decoration":"desert ground, small cacti, distant RV, green smoke"},"center_character":"small Heisenberg figure with black hat and dark clothes standing between the bottom boxes","moral_box":{"title":"ENSEÑANZA:","text":"{argument name=\"moral text\" default=\"NUESTRAS DECISIONES TIENEN CONSECUENCIAS.\"}","icon":"small pink heart beneath the text"}},"text_style":"bold hand-lettered comic font for titles, uppercase Spanish headings, smaller neat rounded sans-serif body text","rendering":"high-resolution poster illustration, symmetrical spacing, thick outlines, kid-safe educational comic aesthetic, humorous but clean and readable"}
